title: Password Reset Policy
content: Users reset passwords from Account Settings by choosing Security, selecting Reset Password, and confirming the email verification code. Password reset links expire after 15 minutes.

title: Multi-factor Authentication
content: Multi-factor authentication is required for administrators and optional for standard users. Supported methods are authenticator apps, SMS codes, and backup recovery codes.

title: Invoice Download
content: Invoices are available in Billing after the monthly cycle closes. Users can download PDF invoices for the last 24 months from Billing History.

title: Refund Eligibility
content: Refund requests are accepted within 14 days of purchase when usage is below 20 percent of the monthly quota. Annual plans are prorated only when required by contract.

title: Data Export
content: Workspace owners can export project data as CSV or JSON from Workspace Settings. Large exports are delivered by email when processing is complete.

title: Data Retention
content: Deleted projects remain recoverable for 30 days. Audit logs are retained for 365 days for enterprise workspaces and 90 days for standard workspaces.

title: Slack Integration
content: Slack notifications can be enabled from Integrations by connecting a workspace and selecting the target channel. Only workspace admins can configure the Slack integration.

title: API Rate Limits
content: The public API allows 600 requests per minute per workspace. When the limit is exceeded, the API returns HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header.

title: Role Permissions
content: Viewers can read projects, editors can modify project content, and owners can manage billing, exports, integrations, and member permissions.

title: Incident Response
content: Security incidents must be reported within 24 hours through the security portal. The response team classifies severity and sends status updates every 4 hours for critical incidents.

title: Support Escalation
content: Priority support is available for enterprise customers. Critical tickets receive a first response within 1 hour, while standard tickets receive a first response within 1 business day.

title: Maintenance Windows
content: Planned maintenance is announced at least 72 hours in advance. Emergency maintenance may happen sooner when needed to protect customer data or service availability.
